title: H2O2 Content Measurement in Leaf Tissue
author: Mingxin Guo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jqhcmt6

steps.title: The seedlings were cultured in Kimura’s...
steps.instruction: The seedlings were cultured in Kimura’s culture solution B until six-leaf stage.

steps.title: 200 mg of fresh leaf tissue...
steps.instruction: 200 mg of fresh leaf tissue subjected to alkaline treatment of pH 9.5 for 0, 3, 5 days was extracted in 2.0 ml of TCA (0.1% w/v) on ice.

steps.title: The homogenate was then centrifuged at...
steps.instruction: The homogenate was then centrifuged at 12,000 rpm for 10 min.

steps.title: add 0
steps.instruction: add 0.3 mL of 10 mM sodium phosphate buffer (pH 7.5).

steps.title: add 0
steps.instruction: add 0.6 mL of 1 M potassium iodide to 0.3 mL of the above supernatant.

steps.title: the absorbance of the samples was measured at 390 nm
steps.instruction: the absorbance of the samples was measured at 390 nm.

steps.title: H2O2 content, expressed as nmol g-1...
steps.instruction: H2O2 content, expressed as nmol g-1 fresh weight, was determined based on the standard curve generated from known concentrations of H2O2.
